mapper.select: SELECT mem_idx AS memIdx, mem_nickname AS memNickname, mem_intro AS memIntro, mem_img AS memImg FROM member_profile WHERE mem_idx = #{memIdx}

SELECT m.mem_idx AS memIdx, m.mem_id AS memId, m.mem_name AS memName, mp.mem_nickname AS memNickname, mp.mem_intro AS memIntro, mp.mem_img AS memImg, g.grade_name AS gradeName, IFNULL(rv.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS reviewCount FROM member m LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx LEFT JOIN grade g ON m.mem_grade_idx = g.grade_idx LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bidder_idx, AVG(review_star) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE review_is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY bidder_idx ) rv ON m.mem_idx = rv.bidder_idx WHERE m.mem_idx = #{memIdx} AND m.mem_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_profile ( mem_idx, mem_nickname, mem_intro, mem_img ) VALUES ( #{memIdx}, #{memNickname}, #{memIntro}, #{memImg} )
